name: MasterNoder Casino Stream
description: Official MasterNoder controller for casino play, MN2 masternode hosting, shop checkout, and daily quests. Slash commands open the full site — PayPal deposits, MN2/crypto buy-ins, Discord play-earn, and hosting VIP rewards. Real-money play stays on masternoder.dk; Discord is the control surface only.
interactions_endpoint_note: No trailing slash. Discord POSTs signed payloads; GET returns health JSON only.

linked_roles_metadata_keys.name: Account linked
linked_roles_metadata_keys.description: 1 if Discord is linked to a MasterNoder site account

linked_roles_metadata_keys.name: Hosting customer
linked_roles_metadata_keys.description: 1 if user has a paid masternode hosting order

upload_hints.icon: Developer Portal → App → Bot or General → upload discord-app-icon.png (1024×1024) or animated GIF
upload_hints.banner: Developer Portal → App → Bot → Banner → upload discord-app-banner.gif (680×240 recommended)
